nodes.label: किरमिच की गेंद
nodes.description: Chapter 3 - A story about friendship and sharing from Rimjhim textbook

nodes.label: कहानी परिचय (Story Introduction)
nodes.description: Overview of the story about children, a leather ball, and the joy of playing together

nodes.label: पात्र: गली के बच्चे
nodes.description: The characters are children from the neighbourhood who play together

nodes.label: स्थान: गली-मोहल्ला
nodes.description: The story is set in the lanes and neighbourhood where children play

nodes.label: विषय: दोस्ती और साझेदारी
nodes.description: The central theme is friendship, sharing, and playing together

nodes.label: किरमिच की गेंद (The Ball)
nodes.description: The leather ball that brings children together and is central to the story

nodes.label: किरमिच: चमड़े जैसा कपड़ा
nodes.description: Rexine is a thick cloth resembling leather, used to make balls in old times

nodes.label: मिलकर खेलना (Playing Together)
nodes.description: Children take turns and cooperate while playing with the ball

nodes.label: बारी-बारी से खेलना
nodes.description: Taking turns is an important part of fair play and friendship

nodes.label: जीवन की सीख (Life Lessons)
nodes.description: Values and lessons learned through the story about the ball

nodes.label: दोस्ती सबसे कीमती
nodes.description: Friendship is more valuable than any toy or material thing

nodes.label: बाँटने से खुशी बढ़ती है
nodes.description: Sharing increases happiness rather than decreasing it

nodes.label: सहयोग और टीमवर्क
nodes.description: Cooperation and teamwork make games and life more enjoyable

nodes.label: भाषा कौशल (Language Skills)
nodes.description: Vocabulary, expressions, and writing skills from the chapter
